languages.text: "Нам больше нечего делить. Убирайся, и забери эту тварь с собой".

traits.locale_text: "Нам больше нечего делить. Убирайся, и забери эту тварь с собой".

languages.text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."
languages.original_text: "Нам больше нечего делить. Убирайся, и забери эту тварь с собой".

traits.locale_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."
"We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."
"We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

languages.text: “你我之间没什么好说的了。滚吧，把那玩意儿也带走。”
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: “你我之间没什么好说的了。滚吧，把那玩意儿也带走。”

languages.text: «No tenemos nada más que decirnos. Márchate y llévate esa cosa».
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: «No tenemos nada más que decirnos. Márchate y llévate esa cosa».

languages.text: « Nous n'avons plus rien à nous dire. Partez et emportez cette chose avec vous. »
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: « Nous n'avons plus rien à nous dire. Partez et emportez cette chose avec vous. »

languages.text: "Birbirimize söyleyecek başka sözümüz yok. Git, o şeyi de yanında götür."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: "Birbirimize söyleyecek başka sözümüz yok. Git, o şeyi de yanında götür."

languages.text: "Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen. Geht und nehmt dieses Ding mit."
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen. Geht und nehmt dieses Ding mit."

languages.text: 「もう何も言わない。去って、その物も持って行け」
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to say to each other. Begone, and take that thing with you."

traits.locale_text: 「もう何も言わない。去って、その物も持って行け」
